ui.selectTopic: Select a topic from the sidebar to view help content.

superAdmin.name: Super Admin
superAdmin.description: Platform-level administrator with access to all companies
responsibilities: Manage multiple companies and their settings
Handle super admin billing and subscriptions

companyAdmin.name: Company Admin
companyAdmin.description: Administrator for a specific company with full control
responsibilities: Handle post moderation and status updates
Generate QR codes for employee invitations

hr.name: HR
hr.description: Human Resources specialist with administrative privileges
responsibilities: Manage HR-specific content and sensitive posts
Access company analytics and audit logs

employee.name: Employee
employee.description: Regular company employee with content creation privileges
responsibilities: Create posts (Problems, Ideas, Creative content, Discussions)
Comment on and engage with posts
View posts assigned to them (if tagged)

postStatus.title: Post Status Workflow
postStatus.description: Track and manage posts through their lifecycle using these status indicators.

OPEN.label: Open
OPEN.whenToUse: Default status for all new posts

ACKNOWLEDGED.label: Acknowledged
ACKNOWLEDGED.description: Admin has seen and acknowledged the post
ACKNOWLEDGED.whenToUse: When you've reviewed the post and want to signal awareness

IN_PROGRESS.label: In Progress
IN_PROGRESS.whenToUse: When work has started to address the post

UNDER_REVIEW.label: Under Review
UNDER_REVIEW.whenToUse: When the post requires investigation or analysis

WORKING_ON.label: Working On
WORKING_ON.description: Forwarded to relevant departments, awaiting response
WORKING_ON.whenToUse: When you've delegated to another team and waiting for updates

RESOLVED.label: Resolved
RESOLVED.whenToUse: When the issue is fully resolved or idea is implemented

CLOSED.label: Closed
CLOSED.whenToUse: When the post doesn't require any action

REJECTED.label: Rejected
REJECTED.description: Not valid, duplicate, or out of scope
REJECTED.whenToUse: When the post is invalid, duplicate, or doesn't align with company goals

NOT_A_PROBLEM.label: Not a Problem
NOT_A_PROBLEM.description: Not a real issue or will be resolved in future
NOT_A_PROBLEM.whenToUse: When the reported issue isn't actually a problem or will resolve itself

bestPractices: Always add a comment when changing status to explain the reason
Update status promptly to keep employees informed
Use ACKNOWLEDGED quickly to show you've seen important posts
Move to RESOLVED only when action is complete
Provide closure by explaining REJECTED or NOT_A_PROBLEM decisions

priority.title: Priority Levels
priority.description: Assign priority to posts to indicate urgency and importance.

CRITICAL.label: Critical
criteria: System outages or major functionality broken

LOW.label: Low
LOW.description: Nice to have, address when possible

bestPractices: Set priority based on business impact, not just urgency
Review and adjust priorities regularly
Communicate priority changes to stakeholders
Use CRITICAL sparingly to maintain its significance

tags.title: User Tag System
tags.description: Tags help classify users by role or seniority for assignment and filtering.
tags.purpose: Tags enable the 'Assigned to Me' feature - when users with tags are mentioned in posts, those posts appear in their assigned section.

SPECIALIST.label: Specialist
SPECIALIST.description: Senior specialists and subject matter experts

howToAssign: Tags are optional - not all users need a tag
Only assign tags to users who need to track assigned items
One user can have multiple tags if they hold multiple roles
Tags don't affect permissions - they're for organization only
bestPractices: Use tags consistently across your organization
Review and update tags during role changes
Don't over-tag - only tag users who need assignment tracking
Document your organization's tag assignment criteria

departments.title: Department Management
departments.description: Organize your company structure with departments.
departments.whatAreDepartments: Departments help you organize members by team, function, or location. They're used for filtering posts, analytics, and access control.
bestPractices: Create departments that match your organizational structure
Keep department names clear and consistent
Assign all members to at least one department
Use departments for targeted content with privacy settings
Review department analytics to track team engagement
useCases: Filter posts by department in feeds
Create department-specific content with privacy controls

memberManagement.title: Member Management
memberManagement.description: Manage users, assign roles, and control access.
howToManage: Use filters to find specific members
Click on a member to view details
Change roles from the dropdown menu
Suspend members to temporarily revoke access
roleAssignment: Assign Company Admin carefully - they have full access
HR role is for human resources personnel
Only Super Admins can create other Super Admins
bulkOperations: Available actions: Change role, Assign tag, Change status
Review selections before applying bulk changes
bestPractices: Regularly audit member roles and access
Suspend rather than delete when access should be temporary
Document role changes in admin notes
Use departments to organize large teams

templates.title: Post Templates
templates.description: Create reusable templates for common post types.
templates.whatAreTemplates: Templates are pre-formatted post structures that help users create consistent, well-structured content quickly.
howToCreate: Choose post type (Problem, Idea, Creative, Discussion)
Add title and content with placeholders
howToUse: When creating a post, look for 'Use Template' option
bestPractices: Create templates for frequently posted content types
Use clear, descriptive template names
Include helpful prompts and examples in templates
Keep templates concise and focused
Review and update templates based on usage

analytics.title: Analytics & Reporting
analytics.description: Understand engagement, trends, and performance metrics.

postsByType.label: Posts by Type
postsByType.description: Distribution of Problem Reports, Ideas, Creative Content, and Discussions
postsByType.useCase: Identify what type of content employees create most

postsByStatus.label: Posts by Status
postsByStatus.description: Current status distribution (Open, In Progress, Resolved, etc.)
postsByStatus.useCase: Track workflow progress and identify bottlenecks

postsByPriority.label: Posts by Priority
postsByPriority.description: Distribution across Critical, High, Medium, Low priorities

engagementMetrics.label: User Engagement
engagementMetrics.useCase: Measure platform adoption and user activity

responseTime.label: Response Time
responseTime.description: Average time to acknowledge and resolve posts

departmentPerformance.label: Department Performance
departmentPerformance.useCase: Compare team engagement and identify trends

howToUse: Click on data points for details
bestPractices: Review analytics weekly to identify trends
Compare periods to track improvement
Use insights to improve processes
Share positive trends to encourage engagement
Act on concerning patterns quickly

moderation.title: Content Moderation
moderation.description: Review reported content and maintain community standards.

PENDING.label: Pending
PENDING.action: Review the content and take appropriate action

actions.whenToUse: Report is invalid or content is acceptable
Minor violation, user should be informed
Content violates policies and should be hidden

reviewProcess: Read the report and reported content carefully
Review context (previous posts, comments, user history)
Take appropriate action based on severity
Communicate decision to reporter and reported user
bestPractices: Review reports promptly (within 24 hours)
Be consistent in applying standards
Always document your reasoning
Escalate serious issues to leadership
Provide clear communication to users
Learn from patterns in reports

postCreation.title: Creating Posts
postCreation.description: Share problems, ideas, creative content, and discussions.

problem_report.label: Problem Report
problem_report.description: Report issues, bugs, or problems that need resolution
problem_report.whenToUse: When something is broken, not working, or causing issues

idea_suggestion.label: Idea Suggestion
idea_suggestion.description: Suggest improvements, features, or new ideas
idea_suggestion.whenToUse: When you have ideas to improve products, processes, or the workplace

creative_content.label: Creative Content
creative_content.description: Share creative work, designs, or innovative concepts
creative_content.whenToUse: When sharing designs, creative projects, or artistic content
tips: Use visuals to showcase your work

team_discussion.label: Team Discussion
team_discussion.whenToUse: When you want to gather input, brainstorm, or discuss topics

HR_ONLY.label: HR Only
HR_ONLY.description: Only visible to HR and admins

bestPractices: Choose the right post type for your content
Write clear, descriptive titles
Provide sufficient context and details
Use appropriate privacy settings
Add relevant tags or mentions
Proofread before posting

qrCode.title: QR Code for Employee Invitations
qrCode.description: Generate QR codes to simplify employee onboarding.
howItWorks: Admin generates a company-specific QR code
QR code is printed or displayed digitally
New employees scan with their mobile device
They're directed to registration with company pre-filled
After registration, they gain instant access
howToGenerate: Navigate to QR Code page in admin panel
Download QR code image or PDF with instructions
Share with new employees or display in office
distributionMethods: Print and post in common areas
Include in new hire welcome packets
Share digitally via email or messaging
bestPractices: Include clear instructions with QR code
Test QR code before wide distribution
Regenerate periodically for security
Track successful registrations
Provide alternative registration methods

assignedToMe.title: Assigned to Me
assignedToMe.description: Track posts and tasks assigned to you.
howItWorks: Admins can assign posts to tagged users
When mentioned or assigned, posts appear in 'Assigned to Me'
Only users with tags see this section
Acts as your personal task list
whatToExpect: Posts requiring your attention or action
Items where you're mentioned or tagged
Tasks delegated to you by admins
Priority items for your role level
bestPractices: Check assigned items daily
Prioritize by urgency and deadline
Communicate status proactively
Ask for clarification when needed

tooltips.pinPost: Pin this post to keep it at the top of the feed
tooltips.archivePost: Archive this post to remove it from active feeds
tooltips.deletePost: Permanently delete this post and all its comments
tooltips.editPost: Edit post content, privacy, or settings
tooltips.changePriority: Update the priority level (Critical, High, Medium, Low)
tooltips.assignPost: Assign this post to specific users for action
tooltips.addDueDate: Set a deadline for resolution or completion
tooltips.adminComment: Add a private admin note (visible to admins only)
tooltips.reportContent: Report this content for moderation review
tooltips.saveAsDraft: Save as draft to finish later
tooltips.schedulePost: Schedule this post to be published later
tooltips.useTemplate: Use a template to speed up post creation
